rationale: Both reviews correctly flag real generality problems in the shown diff: Review 1 on AlgPoints being k-points only (line 43) vs functorial, Review 2 on AffineAlgGroup using [Field k] (line 36) instead of [CommRing k]. Acting on either fixes a distinct but comparably material generality issue (maintainers would accept either change); other findings are vacuous/True placeholders or bundling, which are correctness or roadmap-based rather than generality, making the resulting PRs equally improved.
